message:
feat(channel,trace): add session-typed tracked channels and replay divergence diagnostics tests

Two new files implementing features from the backlog:

1. src/channel/session.rs — Session-typed two-phase channels with
   obligation tracking. Wraps mpsc and oneshot channels with
   TrackedSender/TrackedOneshotSender that enforce the reserve/commit
   protocol at the type level. Dropping a TrackedPermit without calling
   send() or abort() triggers a drop-bomb panic via ObligationToken,
   ensuring channel obligations are never silently leaked. Includes
   compile-fail doc tests to verify type-level safety. (531 lines)

2. tests/replay_divergence_diagnostics.rs — E2E tests for the replay
   divergence diagnostic pipeline (bd-ahj21). Records a real trace from
   the Lab runtime, introduces controlled divergences, then verifies
   that the diagnostic system produces structured, actionable reports
   including minimal divergent prefix identification and divergence
   category classification. (318 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
